perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a yellow t-shirt and a grey flat cap, stands in an indoor setting with white curtains in the background. He looks directly at the camera and gestures expressively with his hands. (2) Graphics of a locked smartphone and various text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear around him. (3) The scene cuts rapidly between slightly different camera angles of the man as he explains the lockout durations. (4) He points to different areas of the screen where solution steps and icons for Apple ID, iTunes, and iCloud are displayed. (5) He briefly holds a gold-colored smartphone to demonstrate. (6) The man continues talking enthusiastically, ending with a final hand gesture and a point towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately alongside a clear, energetic male voice speaking Mandarin. (2) Short, sharp digital sound effects (pops and pings) accompany the appearance of text and graphic overlays. (3) The vocal remains high-volume and dominant, maintaining an instructional and friendly tone throughout. (4) The ambient background is quiet, suggesting a studio or controlled indoor recording environment. (5) The music and vocals cut off simultaneously at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "密碼輸錯幾次就會被鎖？" - Hook text, inquiring tone regarding iPhone lockouts. (2) "第六次錯誤 鎖1分鐘", "第七次錯誤 鎖5分鐘", "第八次錯誤 鎖15分鐘" - Functional text providing specific data points. (3) "解決方法一 Apple ID 重設", "解決方法二 iTunes/Finder", "解決方法三 iCloud 遠端清除" - Functional text listing solutions. (4) "3c有意思tim哥" - Decorative/Functional branding for the creator. (5) "miko" - Decorative brand logo in the top left corner.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Data Points -> Three Solutions -> Conclusion/Call to Action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man, wearing glasses, a yellow 'Roots Canada' t-shirt, and a grey flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with vertical white curtains and a glimpse of a grey sofa.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information -> Solution 1 -> Solution 2 -> Solution 3 -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick educational guide for iPhone users on how to handle forgotten passcodes and lockout situations using official Apple recovery methods.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Persistent brand logo 'miko' in the corner and creator-specific channel branding.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's specific greeting/style and the constant '3c有意思Tim哥' watermark.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast-paced mobile-friendly editing styles typical of TikTok or YouTube Shorts, with heavy use of stickers and color-coded text to maintain engagement.
